steps.title: Set up the confidence interval
steps.content:
The plausible range for the true percentage is the estimate plus or minus the margin of error:
$$66\% \pm 2.91\%$$

steps.title: Compute the bounds
steps.content:
Lower: $66 - 2.91 = 63.09\%$
Upper: $66 + 2.91 = 68.91\%$

So plausible values are any value greater than $63.09\%$ and less than $68.91\%$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
